name: Sableye

forms.name: Mega
forms.pokedexDescription: Bathed in the energy of Mega Evolution, the gemstone on its chest expands, rips through its skin, and falls out.

forms.name: alatian
forms.pokedexDescription: Due to low mineral presence in Alatia's caves, it's adapted to eat metal ores and such instead, causing repeating issues in Alatia's underground railway system.

forms.name: Bloodmoon
forms.pokedexDescription: This Sableye hoards stones touched by crimson moonlight, polishing them into mirror-gems that pulse like living hearts.

pokedexDescription: Sableye digs the ground with sharpened claws to find rocks that it eats. Substances in the eaten rocks crystallize and rise up to the Pokémon's body surface.

evolutions.summary: Nivel · Sosteniendo: faismythicalmonstrosities:bloodstone · De noche · (consume objeto sostenido) · variante bloodmoon
